pi_items.source: iDempiere GardenWorld seed data - confirmed as standard business partner in demo database. Web search: iDempiere wiki and documentation confirm GardenWorld includes C&W Construction as a sample business partner.

Task description explicitly states: 'Set the Name/Description to "Defective Patio Set Return"'. This description contains the keyword 'Defective' which aligns with the metadata claim. The task verifier checks if description.lower() contains 'defective' or 'return'.
Task description specifies: 'create a new line' with 'set Quantity to 1'. The verifier checks if line_count > 0. The minimum of 1 line is correct per task requirements.

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a Return Material Authorization (RMA) in iDempiere's GardenWorld demo database for business partner C&W Construction with at least one line item. C&W Construction is a verified business partner in the GardenWorld seed data. The RMA description is expected to contain the keyword 'Defective' (as in 'Defective Patio Set Return'). The task requires minimum 1 line item in the RMA. All metadata claims match the task requirements and iDempiere's standard RMA functionality documented in Window ID-320 (Customer RMA).
